title: Assigning a person to a column
excerpt:

Working on a workflow with the goal to project as much information as possible in one board. Therefore the layout is horizontal with each product being a row/item. Each column is where you put the respective i…

posts.author: Simen (Simen Angell-Olsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
Working on a workflow with the goal to project as much information as possible in one board. Therefore the layout is horizontal with each product being a row/item. Each column is where you put the respective information.
My question is, are there any way of assigning a person to a column instead of a row?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Simen

Welcome to the community. In monday.com values are set on a row basis. However, if you want to set a values (in your case add a person) you can select multiple (or all items) at once and then add the person to a row/column that is selected. This will update ALL selected rows.
